description_long: This is a rectangular wooden table with a minimalist design, featuring a flat, smooth tabletop and four straight, tapered legs positioned at each corner. The wood grain is visible across the surface, giving it a natural and warm appearance. The table has no visible drawers, handles, or decorative elements, emphasizing a clean and functional aesthetic. Its proportions suggest it is suitable for dining, working, or communal activities. The construction appears sturdy, with legs securely attached to the tabletop. The finish is matte, providing a subtle sheen without being glossy.
description: A minimalist rectangular wooden table with a smooth surface and four tapered legs, showcasing visible wood grain and a matte finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the tabletop and all four legs, highlighting the table's rectangular shape and clean lines.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the narrow edge of the tabletop and the depth of the table, with two legs visible.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, showing the full width and all four legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, mirroring view 1, showing the narrow tabletop edge and two legs.
